⬡ Free AI Audit · Step 2 of 2

Tell us a bit more about your business

A few extra questions so we can prepare a tailored AI Audit for you. Takes about 3 minutes.

Step 1 of 4 25% complete

Confirm your details

We've pre-filled this from the earlier form — feel free to edit.

Please enter your first name.
Please enter a valid email.
Please enter your company name.
Optional — helps us research your business before the call.

Business context

So we can benchmark you against similar companies we've audited.

Please select your industry.
Please select your team size.
Please select your revenue range.

Where you are with AI today

Be honest — there are no wrong answers.

Please pick the biggest challenge.
List the AI tools or automations already in your stack.
Please share at least one process. Even rough estimates help — we'll quantify the ROI.

Timeline & what success looks like

The final stretch. This helps us tailor recommendations to your reality.

Please pick a timeline.
Optional — purely so we recommend the right tier of solution.
Please share what success looks like. One sentence is plenty — be specific where you can.

Your information is encrypted and used only to prepare your AI Audit.
Read our privacy policy · We never share or sell data.

Sending your audit request…
Please don't refresh.
